title: OSCORE Context struct missing Debug derive (needs sensitive data redaction)
description:
lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs:104-127 defines:
```rust
#[derive(Clone, Zeroize)]
#[zeroize(drop)]
pub struct Context {
    master_secret: [u8; KEY_LEN],
    sender_key: [u8; KEY_LEN],
    recipient_key: [u8; KEY_LEN],
    ...
}
```

Missing Debug derive. However, a manual Debug impl is needed to redact sensitive fields (keys). The keys.rs module shows how: `write!(f, "Context{{ master_secret: [REDACTED], ... }}")`.
